hotspot: applyControllerNavigationMetadata() scans and annotates many UI zones with querySelectorAll on each modal or UI refresh.
showSimpleModal() clears modalRoot, injects new markup, replays focus logic, and reapplies controller navigation metadata.
showHubModal() rebuilds the full hub shell and delegates to showSimpleModal() for pack, magic, and journal transitions.
showUtilityMenu() synchronously fills several summary panels and save slot details before the modal becomes visible.
render() recalculates multiple HUD surfaces and reapplies navigation metadata even when work is indirectly tied to menu transitions.
pack-filter and journal-section handlers route back through showHubModal(), causing full modal refresh for local content changes.
refreshMagicHub() also routes to showHubModal(), so magic filter and spell-management updates rebuild the shell.
showCreationModal() rebuilds the complete creation surface and follows with refreshChrome() and navigation metadata setup.
getAdvisorModel() derives large HUD strings and action recommendations, contributing to broad render cost during gameplay transitions.
refreshPackInspectorPreview() replaces the inspector subtree on hover/focus changes; lower priority for phone, but still churn-heavy.
